top3.sql:
SELECT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'))
   OR (c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'));

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'))
   OR (c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'));

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN atom a2 ON (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id)
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'))
   OR (c.atom_id2 = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_8') 
       AND c.atom_id = (SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE atom_id = 'TR004_20'));

SELECT b.bond_type
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
JOIN atom a2 ON (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id)
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';

final.sql:
SELECT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR004_20';
